title: Cheap Recipes
description: Adds cheaper ender chest, golden apples, and cob web recipes.
body: This is a perfect plugin for Minecraft SMPs, it adds cheaper ender chest, golden apples, and cob web recipes. This is great for fast paced SMPs. Golden Apples now need 4 golden ingots instead of 8, Cobwebs can be crafted with 9 string, and Enderchests use an ender pearl instead of an ender eye.
